channel.title: Llm on Rack Myself
channel.description: Recent content in Llm on Rack Myself

item.title: How to Run a Local LLM on a Consumer GPU (3090, 4090, etc.)
item.description: A practical guide to running large language models on consumer NVIDIA GPUs. Which models fit in which VRAM, what to buy, and how to set it all up.

item.title: How to Run Ollama on a Home Server (Local AI Without the Cloud)
item.description: Run powerful AI models like Llama 3, Mistral, and Phi locally on your home server with Ollama. No subscriptions, no data leaks, no cloud dependency.
